title: Michelle Horner Grau
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Michelle Horner Grau
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
published_department: Modern and Classical Languages and Literatures

organizational_affiliations.label: Modern and Classical Languages and Literatures

biography: I am a Pennsylvania native with a heart for other cultures, most notably Spanish-speaking cultures. I have studied in the U.S. and Spain. I am married, with 4 children, 2 stepchildren and 3 grandchildren. I am an active Roman Catholic and have been a teacher at the middle school, high school, college and adult levels. I teach Spanish, English and English as a Second Language. I am passionate about excellence in education.
education_entries: MA in Spanish, Millersville University of PA
BS in Spanish/English Education, Indiana University of PA
teaching_interests: Second Language Acquisition, foreign language methodology, teacher education, Spanish phonetics
